title.en: DeNovoSWE: Scaling Long-Horizon Environments for Generating Entire Repositories from Scratch
title.zh: DeNovoSWE：从零开始生成完整仓库的长周期环境扩展

abstract: As the capabilities of LLM-based code agents continue to advance, their expected role is expanding beyond localized bug fixing in existing codebases toward architecting and implementing complete software repositories from high-level specifications. However, training agents for such long-horizon software engineering tasks remains difficult due to the scarcity of large-scale, verifiable whole-repository generation data. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{DeNovoSWE}, a large-scale dataset for whole-repository generation. DeNovoSWE comprises 4,818 high-quality instances, where each instance requires generating a complete repository from documentation. Our dataset is automatically constructed through a carefully designed sandboxed agentic workflow, enabling scalable curation without human annotation. DeNovoSWE is constructed with "divide and conquer" and critic-repair philosophy. To balance data quality and diversity, we further introduce a difficulty-aware trajectory filtering strategy. Fine-tuning Qwen3-30B-A3B on DeNovoSWE substantially improves long-horizon SWE performance, raising its score on the challenging BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo benchmark from 5.8% to 47.2%.

relevance.en: This paper directly extends your interest in repository-level code generation and post-training by providing a scalable SFT dataset for whole-repo synthesis, and its evaluation on BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo goes beyond pass@k to measure real-world integration, confirming that SFT on long-horizon tasks can dramatically improve correctness.
relevance.zh: 本文通过提供可扩展的全仓库合成SFT数据集，直接扩展了您对仓库级代码生成和后训练的兴趣；其在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo上的评估超越了pass@k，衡量了实际集成能力，证实了在长周期任务上的SFT能显著提升正确性。

caption.en:
· Overview of DeNovoSWE and its role in scaling long-horizon software engineering
tasks. Left: DeNovoSWE extends prior SWE datasets along both task scope and task difficulty,
moving from localized issue fixing in existing codebases to whole-repository generation from
scratch, thereby requiring agents to shift from maintainer-like localized editing toward architect-
level repository construction. Right: DeNovoSWE provides substantially larger-scale repository-
generation supervision, containing 4,818 tasks, about 46× larger than NL2Repo.
caption.zh: · DeNovoSWE及其在扩展长周期软件工程任务中的作用概览。左图：DeNovoSWE沿着任务范围和任务难度扩展了先前的软件工程数据集，从现有代码库中的局部问题修复发展到从零开始生成完整仓库，从而要求智能体从维护者式的局部编辑转向架构师级的仓库构建。右图：DeNovoSWE提供了规模更大的仓库生成监督数据，包含4,818个任务，约为NL2Repo的46倍。

figures.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
· Overview of the DeNovoSWE framework based on a Divide-and-Conquer design.
In the Divide Phase (Top), the repository is decoupled via concurrent tracks: Repository Ability
Partitioning for capability extraction and Repository Profiling for code-dependency tracing. These
aspects are consolidated through an LLM-as-a-Judge to map high-level abilities onto specific code
structures. F. & C. denotes functions and classes. In the Conquer Phase (Bottom), an iterative
multi-agent pipeline (Draft-Critic-Repair) is executed for Ability-Level Document Generation. The
resulting merged documentation is fed into a sandboxed Golden Environment, where the software
agent’s performance is rigorously benchmarked under strict network and package deployment
constraints to determine the final evaluation score.
caption.zh: · 基于分治设计的DeNovoSWE框架概览。在分治阶段（上方），通过并发轨道解耦仓库：仓库能力划分用于能力提取，仓库分析用于代码依赖追踪。这些方面通过LLM-as-a-Judge进行整合，将高层能力映射到特定代码结构。F.和C.表示函数和类。在征服阶段（下方），对能力级文档生成执行迭代多智能体流程（草稿-批评-修复）。生成的合并文档被输入沙盒黄金环境，其中软件智能体的性能在严格的网络和包部署约束下进行严格基准测试，以确定最终评估分数。

figures.reference_text: Comparison with existing benchmarks. As shown in Figure 2, DeNovoSWE substantially expands the scale of repository-generation tasks. Prior benchmarks such as NL2RepoBench (Ding et al., 2025) and BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo (Chen et al., 2026b) contain 104 and 50 task instances, respectively, limiting the diversity. In contrast, DeNovoSWE contains 4,818 instances, making it over an order of magnitude larger than existing repository-generation benchmarks.

figure.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
· Overview of the DeNovoSWE framework based on a Divide-and-Conquer design.
In the Divide Phase (Top), the repository is decoupled via concurrent tracks: Repository Ability
Partitioning for capability extraction and Repository Profiling for code-dependency tracing. These
aspects are consolidated through an LLM-as-a-Judge to map high-level abilities onto specific code
structures. F. & C. denotes functions and classes. In the Conquer Phase (Bottom), an iterative
multi-agent pipeline (Draft-Critic-Repair) is executed for Ability-Level Document Generation. The
resulting merged documentation is fed into a sandboxed Golden Environment, where the software
agent’s performance is rigorously benchmarked under strict network and package deployment
constraints to determine the final evaluation score.
caption.zh: · 基于分治设计的DeNovoSWE框架概览。在分治阶段（上方），通过并发轨道解耦仓库：仓库能力划分用于能力提取，仓库分析用于代码依赖追踪。这些方面通过LLM-as-a-Judge进行整合，将高层能力映射到特定代码结构。F.和C.表示函数和类。在征服阶段（下方），对能力级文档生成执行迭代多智能体流程（草稿-批评-修复）。生成的合并文档被输入沙盒黄金环境，其中软件智能体的性能在严格的网络和包部署约束下进行严格基准测试，以确定最终评估分数。

figure.reference_text: Comparison with existing benchmarks. As shown in Figure 2, DeNovoSWE substantially expands the scale of repository-generation tasks. Prior benchmarks such as NL2RepoBench (Ding et al., 2025) and BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo (Chen et al., 2026b) contain 104 and 50 task instances, respectively, limiting the diversity. In contrast, DeNovoSWE contains 4,818 instances, making it over an order of magnitude larger than existing repository-generation benchmarks.

brief_summary.en:
Language models are advancing from fixing isolated bugs to architecting entire code repositories from scratch, but training them for such long-horizon tasks is blocked by a critical data shortage—existing benchmarks like NL2RepoBench contain only a few hundred examples. Hand-labeling whole-repo generation data is impractical, so automated, scalable methods are urgently needed to enable effective fine-tuning.  

DeNovoSWE addresses this by introducing a large-scale dataset of 4,818 whole-repository generation instances, built entirely through an automated sandboxed agentic workflow. The pipeline uses a divide-and-conquer and critic-repair strategy: it decomposes each repository into ability-level units, generates high-quality documentation via iterative multi-agent refinement, then evaluates an agent’s ability to reconstruct the repo from that documentation. To preserve both quality and diversity, a difficulty-aware filtering strategy adapts thresholds per instance, retaining useful trajectories from harder tasks. Fine-tuning Qwen3-30B-A3B on DeNovoSWE boosted its score on the BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo benchmark from 5.8% to 47.2%, demonstrating that this dataset dramatically improves long-horizon software engineering performance.
brief_summary.zh:
语言模型正在从修复孤立漏洞演进到从零开始构建整个代码仓库，但训练模型处理这类长周期任务面临严重的数据短缺——现有基准如NL2RepoBench仅包含几百个示例。手工标注整个仓库生成数据不切实际，因此迫切需要自动化、可扩展的方法来实现有效微调。

DeNovoSWE通过引入一个包含4,818个完整仓库生成实例的大规模数据集来解决这个问题，该数据集完全通过自动化沙盒智能体工作流构建。该流程采用分治与批评-修复策略：将每个仓库分解为能力级单元，通过迭代多智能体精炼生成高质量文档，然后评估智能体根据文档重建仓库的能力。为了兼顾质量和多样性，一种难度感知过滤策略根据实例自适应调整阈值，保留更困难任务中有用的轨迹。将Qwen3-30B-A3B在DeNovoSWE上微调后，其在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo基准上的得分从5.8%提升至47.2%，表明该数据集显著提升了长周期软件工程性能。

problem.en: Large language model (LLM) based code agents are evolving from localized bug fixing to architecting and implementing complete software repositories from high-level specifications. However, training agents for such long-horizon software engineering (SWE) tasks is severely hindered by the scarcity of large-scale, verifiable whole-repository generation data. Existing datasets for repository generation, such as NL2RepoBench and BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo, contain only 104 and 50 task instances, respectively, offering limited diversity and scale. Furthermore, curating such data through human annotation is impractical due to the high cost and complexity of whole-repo construction. This lack of large-scale, reliably executable supervision prevents effective fine-tuning of LLMs for the demanding, multi-step process of generating entire codebases from scratch, limiting progress toward autonomous architect-level software engineering.
problem.zh: 基于大语言模型的代码智能体正从局部漏洞修复演变为根据高层规范架构和实现完整软件仓库。然而，训练智能体处理此类长周期软件工程任务受到大规模、可验证的全仓库生成数据稀缺的严重阻碍。现有的仓库生成数据集如NL2RepoBench和BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo分别仅包含104个和50个任务实例，多样性和规模有限。此外，通过人工标注来筛选此类数据因全仓库构建的高成本和复杂性而不切实际。缺乏大规模、可靠可执行的监督数据阻碍了LLM在从零开始生成整个代码库这一多步骤过程中进行有效微调，限制了向自主架构级软件工程的发展。

solution.en: DeNovoSWE is a large-scale dataset comprising 4,818 high-quality instances for whole-repository generation from documentation. The key contribution is an automated, sandboxed agentic workflow that constructs this dataset without any human annotation, making it both scalable and reproducible. The core insight is a divide-and-conquer and critic-repair philosophy: the complex task of generating a full repository is decomposed into ability-level subproblems, each tackled via an iterative multi-agent pipeline (Draft-Critic-Repair) to produce high-quality documentation, which then forms the basis for agent evaluation. To maintain both data quality and diversity, a difficulty-aware trajectory filtering strategy adapts the filtering threshold per instance, preventing overly aggressive removal of useful trajectories from harder tasks. This directly contrasts with prior work that relied on small, manually curated sets or fixed filtering thresholds, enabling over an order-of-magnitude increase in training data scale (46× larger than NL2Repo) and substantial performance gains on downstream benchmarks.
solution.zh: DeNovoSWE是一个大规模数据集，包含4,818个从文档生成完整仓库的高质量实例。关键贡献是一个自动化的沙盒智能体工作流，无需任何人工标注即可构建该数据集，使其兼具可扩展性和可复现性。核心思想是分治和批评-修复理念：将生成完整仓库的复杂任务分解为能力级子问题，每个子问题通过迭代多智能体流程（草稿-批评-修复）生成高质量文档，然后作为智能体评估的基础。为了兼顾数据质量和多样性，一种难度感知的轨迹过滤策略根据实例自适应调整过滤阈值，避免过度丢弃困难任务中有用的轨迹。这与依赖小型手工筛选集或固定过滤阈值的先前工作直接形成对比，使得训练数据规模扩大了一个数量级以上（比NL2Repo大46倍），并在下游基准上实现了显著的性能提升。

methodology.en: The DeNovoSWE construction pipeline is a fully automated, sandboxed agentic workflow designed to generate executable whole-repo generation tasks from existing open-source repositories. It follows a divide-and-conquer pattern: The Divide Phase (top) concurrently performs Repository Ability Partitioning, which extracts high-level capabilities from the repository (e.g., features, modules), and Repository Profiling, which traces code-dependency relationships (functions, classes). These two aspects are consolidated by an LLM-as-a-Judge, which maps each high-level ability onto specific code structures, effectively decomposing the repository into manageable ability-level units. The Conquer Phase (bottom) executes an iterative multi-agent pipeline (Draft-Critic-Repair) for each ability unit to generate natural language documentation that accurately describes the corresponding code. This generates ability-level documents that are merged into a single specification. This merged documentation is then fed into a sandboxed Golden Environment—a carefully controlled execution environment with strict network and package deployment constraints—where a software agent attempts to generate the entire repository from scratch. The agent's performance is rigorously benchmarked, producing trajectory scores that quantify how well the agent reproduces the original repository. To balance quality and diversity, the authors introduce a difficulty-aware trajectory filtering strategy: they first estimate the difficulty of each repository-generation instance (e.g., based on repository complexity, size, dependency depth), then adapt the filtering threshold per instance such that easier instances require higher trajectory scores for inclusion, while harder instances retain more moderate-scoring trajectories. This avoids the problem shown in Figure 3 (left) where fixed thresholds disproportionately discard useful trajectories from difficult tasks. The final dataset contains 4,818 filtered instances, each an (input specification, expected repository) pair, suitable for supervised fine-tuning.
methodology.zh: DeNovoSWE构建流程是一个完全自动化的沙盒智能体工作流，旨在从现有开源仓库生成可执行的全仓库生成任务。它遵循分治模式：分治阶段（顶部）并发执行仓库能力划分（从仓库中提取高层能力，如功能、模块）和仓库分析（追踪代码依赖关系，如函数、类）。这两个方面通过LLM-as-a-Judge进行整合，将每个高层能力映射到特定代码结构，从而将仓库有效分解为可管理的能力级单元。征服阶段（底部）对每个能力单元执行迭代多智能体流程（草稿-批评-修复），生成准确描述相应代码的自然语言文档。这产生能力级文档，合并为单一规范。然后，该合并文档被输入沙盒黄金环境——一个严格控制网络和包部署约束的执行环境——其中软件智能体尝试从零开始生成整个仓库。智能体的性能经过严格基准测试，产生量化其重建原始仓库效果的轨迹得分。为平衡质量和多样性，作者引入了难度感知轨迹过滤策略：首先估计每个仓库生成实例的难度（例如基于仓库复杂度、大小、依赖深度），然后自适应调整每个实例的过滤阈值，使得较容易的实例需要更高轨迹得分才能被包含，而较困难的实例则保留更多中等得分的轨迹。这避免了如图3（左）所示的固定阈值不成比例地丢弃困难任务中有用轨迹的问题。最终数据集包含4,818个过滤后的实例，每个实例是（输入规范，期望仓库）对，适用于监督微调。

experiments.en: The authors evaluate DeNovoSWE by fine-tuning Qwen3-30B-A3B on the dataset and testing on the BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo and NL2RepoBench benchmarks. On BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo, the fine-tuned model achieves a score of 47.2%, a dramatic improvement from the base Qwen3-30B-A3B's score of 5.8%, demonstrating an absolute gain of 41.4 percentage points. The paper also reports ablation studies on the difficulty-aware trajectory filtering strategy, comparing against difficulty-independent baselines with fixed trajectory-score thresholds of 0.95, 0.80, and 0.60. Lowering the fixed threshold from 0.95 to 0.60 consistently improves performance on both benchmarks, indicating that overly aggressive filtering removes valuable trajectories from hard instances. The final difficulty-aware filtering outperforms all fixed-threshold variants. Additionally, the paper highlights the scale of DeNovoSWE: with 4,818 instances, it is approximately 46 times larger than the next largest repository-generation benchmark (NL2Repo), significantly expanding the scope of available training data. No detailed per-baseline numbers or other model comparisons are provided beyond the primary result.
experiments.zh: 作者通过在DeNovoSWE上微调Qwen3-30B-A3B并在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo和NL2RepoBench基准上进行测试来评估DeNovoSWE。在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo上，微调模型达到47.2%的得分，相比基础Qwen3-30B-A3B的5.8%有显著提升，绝对增益达41.4个百分点。论文还报告了难度感知轨迹过滤策略的消融研究，与固定轨迹得分阈值（0.95、0.80和0.60）的难度无关基线进行了比较。将固定阈值从0.95降低到0.60在两个基准上持续提升性能，表明过度激进的过滤会移除困难实例中的有价值轨迹。最终难度感知过滤优于所有固定阈值变体。此外，论文强调了DeNovoSWE的规模：包含4,818个实例，约为下一个最大仓库生成基准（NL2Repo）的46倍，显著扩展了可用训练数据的范围。除主要结果外，未提供详细的逐基线数值或其他模型比较。

conclusion.en: The paper shows that fine-tuning on DeNovoSWE, an automatically curated set of whole-repository generation tasks, dramatically lifts LLM agent performance on long-horizon SWE benchmarks—from 5.8% to 47.2% on BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo—using a divide-and-conquer and critic-repair workflow with difficulty-aware filtering. However, the paper does not detail the execution-based metrics used for verification, explain how cross-file dependencies are modeled, or compare its filtering strategy to alternatives like RLHF, leaving the inner mechanisms behind the score improvement unclear. This means the dataset and approach are promising for overcoming data scarcity in repository-level generation, but the lack of such specifics cautions that the observed gains may partly reflect benchmark-specific patterns rather than robust, generalizable learning of execution feedback or inter-file reasoning.
conclusion.zh: 论文表明，在自动筛选的全仓库生成任务集DeNovoSWE上微调，显著提升了LLM智能体在长周期软件工程基准上的表现——在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo上从5.8%提升至47.2%——采用了分治和批评-修复工作流以及难度感知过滤。然而，论文未详细说明用于验证的基于执行的指标，未解释如何建模跨文件依赖，也未将其过滤策略与RLHF等替代方案进行比较，使得得分提升背后的内部机制不明确。这意味着数据集和方法在克服仓库级生成的数据稀缺方面很有前景，但缺乏此类细节警告说，观察到的收益可能部分反映了基准特定的模式，而非对执行反馈或跨文件推理的稳健、可泛化的学习。

question.en: How does the DeNovoSWE pipeline's 'difficulty-aware trajectory filtering' strategy compare to standard rejection sampling or RLHF-style preference learning for curating high-quality repository-level code generation training data?
question.zh: DeNovoSWE流程的“难度感知轨迹过滤”策略与标准的拒绝采样或RLHF风格偏好学习相比，在筛选高质量仓库级代码生成训练数据方面表现如何？

reason.en: This question directly targets the user's interest in post-training techniques (specifically preference learning and data filtering for SFT). The paper introduces a filtering strategy to balance data quality and diversity, potentially serving as an automated alternative to human-annotated preferences. By comparing it to RLHF-style methods, we can assess whether DeNovoSWE's approach offers a scalable, reproducible way to improve repository-level generation correctness without human feedback.
reason.zh: 该问题直接针对用户对后训练技术（尤其是偏好学习和SFT数据过滤）的兴趣。本文引入了一种过滤策略以平衡数据质量和多样性，可能作为人工标注偏好的自动化替代方案。通过与RLHF风格方法比较，可以评估DeNovoSWE的方法是否提供了无需人类反馈的可扩展、可复现的仓库级生成正确性改进途径。

question.en: What specific execution-based metrics does DeNovoSWE's automated workflow use to verify that a generated repository compiles, passes tests, and integrates successfully? How do these metrics go beyond traditional pass@k on isolated functions?
question.zh: DeNovoSWE的自动化工作流使用哪些具体的基于执行的指标来验证生成的仓库能够编译、通过测试并成功集成？这些指标如何超越传统孤立函数上的pass@k？

reason.en: This probes the user's emphasis on evaluation methodologies that measure real-world software engineering outcomes (compilation, execution, integration). The paper's sandboxed agentic workflow likely includes executable verification steps—understanding these would reveal how DeNovoSWE sets a new benchmark for whole-repository evaluation, addressing the user's interest in benchmarks that capture integration success rather than just single-function correctness.
reason.zh: 这探究了用户对评估方法的重视，这些方法衡量真实世界的软件工程结果（编译、执行、集成）。论文的沙盒智能体工作流可能包含可执行的验证步骤——理解这些步骤将揭示DeNovoSWE如何为全仓库评估树立新基准，满足用户对捕捉集成成功而非仅单函数正确性的基准的兴趣。

question.en: How does DeNovoSWE's 'divide and conquer' approach to repository-level generation handle long-context dependencies across multiple files and modules? Does the pipeline's design implicitly model inter-file relationships or does it rely on the base LLM's long-context capacity during fine-tuning?
question.zh: DeNovoSWE的“分治”方法在处理跨多个文件和模块的长上下文依赖方面如何运作？流程设计是否隐式建模了文件间关系，还是依赖于基础LLM在微调期间的长上下文能力？

reason.en: This question targets the user's focus on long-context handling in repository-level code generation. The divide-and-conquer strategy suggests a decomposition of the task, which could alleviate long-context challenges. Clarifying whether the dataset construction or the fine-tuned model itself must manage cross-file dependencies provides insight into how LLMs can be trained to handle long-range code context—a core theme of the user's research interests.
reason.zh: 该问题针对用户对仓库级代码生成长上下文处理的关注。分治策略暗示了任务分解，可能缓解长上下文挑战。明确数据集构建或微调模型本身是否必须管理跨文件依赖，将揭示LLM如何训练以处理长范围代码上下文——这是用户研究兴趣的核心主题。

question.en: What evidence does the paper provide that fine-tuning on DeNovoSWE improves an LLM's ability to generate correct code in environments requiring execution feedback (e.g., iterative debugging or adaptation to existing codebases), beyond the reported 47.2% score on BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo?
question.zh: 论文提供了哪些证据表明在DeNovoSWE上微调能提升LLM在需要执行反馈的环境（如迭代调试或适应现有代码库）中生成正确代码的能力，而不仅仅是报告在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo上47.2%的得分？

reason.en: This connects to the user's interest in RL with execution feedback and practical code generation correctness. The paper's benchmark score is a high-level result, but deeper insights into whether the model learns to correct errors via execution signals (as might be present in the sandboxed workflow) or merely memorizes correct generation patterns would inform how post-training can incorporate execution-based feedback for repository-level tasks.
reason.zh: 这与用户对带执行反馈的强化学习及实际代码生成正确性的兴趣相关。论文的基准得分是高级结果，但更深入的见解——模型是否通过执行信号（如沙盒工作流中可能存在的）学会修正错误，还是仅记忆了正确生成模式——将告诉我们后训练如何将基于执行的反馈融入仓库级任务。

question.en: How does the DeNovoSWE pipeline's 'difficulty-aware trajectory filtering' strategy compare to standard rejection sampling or RLHF-style preference learning for curating high-quality repository-level code generation training data?
question.zh: DeNovoSWE流程的“难度感知轨迹过滤”策略与标准的拒绝采样或RLHF风格偏好学习相比，在筛选高质量仓库级代码生成训练数据方面表现如何？

reason.en: This question directly targets the user's interest in post-training techniques (specifically preference learning and data filtering for SFT). The paper introduces a filtering strategy to balance data quality and diversity, potentially serving as an automated alternative to human-annotated preferences. By comparing it to RLHF-style methods, we can assess whether DeNovoSWE's approach offers a scalable, reproducible way to improve repository-level generation correctness without human feedback.
reason.zh: 该问题直接针对用户对后训练技术（尤其是偏好学习和SFT数据过滤）的兴趣。本文引入了一种过滤策略以平衡数据质量和多样性，可能作为人工标注偏好的自动化替代方案。通过与RLHF风格方法比较，可以评估DeNovoSWE的方法是否提供了无需人类反馈的可扩展、可复现的仓库级生成正确性改进途径。

answer.en: The paper does not directly compare its 'difficulty-aware trajectory filtering' strategy to standard rejection sampling or RLHF-style preference learning. The abstract only mentions that the strategy is introduced 'to balance data quality and diversity' and that the dataset is 'automatically constructed through a carefully designed sandboxed agentic workflow, enabling scalable curation without human annotation' — implying a fully automated approach distinct from RLHF which typically requires human preferences. However, no inline evidence describes how the filtering mechanism works relative to these alternatives. Therefore, a substantive comparison cannot be drawn from the provided text.
answer.zh: 论文并未直接将“难度感知轨迹过滤”策略与标准拒绝采样或RLHF风格偏好学习进行比较。摘要仅提及该策略“用于平衡数据质量和多样性”，且数据集是通过“精心设计的沙盒智能体工作流自动构建，无需人工标注即可实现可扩展的筛选”——暗示这是一种完全自动化的方法，与通常需要人类偏好的RLHF不同。然而，文中未提供内联证据描述过滤机制相对于这些替代方案的具体工作原理。因此，根据提供的文本无法得出实质性比较。

question.en: What specific execution-based metrics does DeNovoSWE's automated workflow use to verify that a generated repository compiles, passes tests, and integrates successfully? How do these metrics go beyond traditional pass@k on isolated functions?
question.zh: DeNovoSWE的自动化工作流使用哪些具体的基于执行的指标来验证生成的仓库能够编译、通过测试并成功集成？这些指标如何超越传统孤立函数上的pass@k？

reason.en: This probes the user's emphasis on evaluation methodologies that measure real-world software engineering outcomes (compilation, execution, integration). The paper's sandboxed agentic workflow likely includes executable verification steps—understanding these would reveal how DeNovoSWE sets a new benchmark for whole-repository evaluation, addressing the user's interest in benchmarks that capture integration success rather than just single-function correctness.
reason.zh: 这探究了用户对评估方法的重视，这些方法衡量真实世界的软件工程结果（编译、执行、集成）。论文的沙盒智能体工作流可能包含可执行的验证步骤——理解这些步骤将揭示DeNovoSWE如何为全仓库评估树立新基准，满足用户对捕捉集成成功而非仅单函数正确性的基准的兴趣。

answer.en: The paper does not enumerate specific execution-based metrics (e.g., compilation success rate, test pass rate, integration checks) for verifying repositories in the automated workflow. The abstract states that DeNovoSWE is "automatically constructed through a carefully designed sandboxed agentic workflow" and that instances are "high-quality" thanks to a "difficulty-aware trajectory filtering strategy," but it never describes what executable verification steps that workflow actually runs. No mention is made of compilation, test execution, or integration verification beyond the high-level claim that the workflow is "sandboxed." The evaluation on the BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo benchmark reports a score, not specific pass@k or execution metrics—so the paper cannot be used to answer what metrics go beyond traditional pass@k on isolated functions.
answer.zh: 论文未列举自动化工作流中用于验证仓库的具体基于执行的指标（例如编译成功率、测试通过率、集成检查）。摘要称DeNovoSWE是“通过精心设计的沙盒智能体工作流自动构建”，且实例因“难度感知轨迹过滤策略”而“高质量”，但未描述该工作流实际运行了哪些可执行验证步骤。除声明工作流是“沙盒化”外，未提及编译、测试执行或集成验证。在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo基准上的评估报告的是一个分数，而非具体的pass@k或执行指标——因此无法用该论文回答哪些指标超越了传统孤立函数上的pass@k。

question.en: How does DeNovoSWE's 'divide and conquer' approach to repository-level generation handle long-context dependencies across multiple files and modules? Does the pipeline's design implicitly model inter-file relationships or does it rely on the base LLM's long-context capacity during fine-tuning?
question.zh: DeNovoSWE的“分治”方法在处理跨多个文件和模块的长上下文依赖方面如何运作？流程设计是否隐式建模了文件间关系，还是依赖于基础LLM在微调期间的长上下文能力？

reason.en: This question targets the user's focus on long-context handling in repository-level code generation. The divide-and-conquer strategy suggests a decomposition of the task, which could alleviate long-context challenges. Clarifying whether the dataset construction or the fine-tuned model itself must manage cross-file dependencies provides insight into how LLMs can be trained to handle long-range code context—a core theme of the user's research interests.
reason.zh: 该问题针对用户对仓库级代码生成长上下文处理的关注。分治策略暗示了任务分解，可能缓解长上下文挑战。明确数据集构建或微调模型本身是否必须管理跨文件依赖，将揭示LLM如何训练以处理长范围代码上下文——这是用户研究兴趣的核心主题。

answer.en: The provided abstract does not detail how DeNovoSWE's 'divide and conquer' approach handles long-context dependencies across multiple files or modules. It states that the dataset is constructed with a 'divide and conquer' and 'critic-repair philosophy' and that fine-tuning Qwen3-30B-A3B on DeNovoSWE 'substantially improves long-horizon SWE performance,' but it offers no explanation of whether inter-file relationships are explicitly modeled in the pipeline or left to the base LLM's long-context capacity during fine-tuning. Without further description of the decomposition strategy or the fine-tuning data's structure, it is impossible to determine from this text alone how cross-file dependencies are managed.
answer.zh: 提供的摘要未详细说明DeNovoSWE的“分治”方法如何处理跨多个文件或模块的长上下文依赖。它提及数据集采用“分治和批评-修复理念”构建，且微调Qwen3-30B-A3B在DeNovoSWE上“显著提升了长周期软件工程性能”，但未解释流程中是否显式建模了文件间关系，或是在微调期间留给基础LLM的长上下文能力。由于缺乏对分解策略或微调数据结构的进一步描述，仅凭本文无法确定跨文件依赖是如何管理的。

question.en: What evidence does the paper provide that fine-tuning on DeNovoSWE improves an LLM's ability to generate correct code in environments requiring execution feedback (e.g., iterative debugging or adaptation to existing codebases), beyond the reported 47.2% score on BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo?
question.zh: 论文提供了哪些证据表明在DeNovoSWE上微调能提升LLM在需要执行反馈的环境（如迭代调试或适应现有代码库）中生成正确代码的能力，而不仅仅是报告在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo上47.2%的得分？

reason.en: This connects to the user's interest in RL with execution feedback and practical code generation correctness. The paper's benchmark score is a high-level result, but deeper insights into whether the model learns to correct errors via execution signals (as might be present in the sandboxed workflow) or merely memorizes correct generation patterns would inform how post-training can incorporate execution-based feedback for repository-level tasks.
reason.zh: 这与用户对带执行反馈的强化学习及实际代码生成正确性的兴趣相关。论文的基准得分是高级结果，但更深入的见解——模型是否通过执行信号（如沙盒工作流中可能存在的）学会修正错误，还是仅记忆了正确生成模式——将告诉我们后训练如何将基于执行的反馈融入仓库级任务。

answer.en: The paper does not provide direct evidence that fine-tuning on DeNovoSWE improves an LLM's ability to correct errors via execution feedback or adapt to existing codebases. The reported gain from 5.8% to 47.2% on BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo is a single end-to-end accuracy score, and the authors note their dataset is built using a "divide and conquer" and "critic-repair philosophy" within a "sandboxed agentic workflow" to curate trajectories. However, they do not ablate whether the fine-tuned model learns to exploit execution signals versus memorizing patterns—the paper's main contribution is the dataset and the observed score improvement. The abstract states the dataset is "automatically constructed through a carefully designed sandboxed agentic workflow, enabling scalable curation without human annotation," which implies execution feedback was used to generate training data, but no analysis is provided on whether the model internalizes that feedback for iterative debugging or adaptation. The paper stops at reporting the benchmark score.
answer.zh: 论文未提供直接证据表明在DeNovoSWE上微调能提升LLM通过执行反馈修正错误或适应现有代码库的能力。报告的在BeyondSWE-Doc2Repo上从5.8%到47.2%的提升是一个单一的端到端准确率分数，作者指出其数据集是在“沙盒智能体工作流”中采用“分治和批评-修复理念”构建以筛选轨迹。然而，他们没有分析微调模型是否利用了执行信号还是仅记忆了模式——论文的主要贡献是数据集和观察到的得分提升。摘要指出数据集是“通过精心设计的沙盒智能体工作流自动构建，无需人工标注即可实现可扩展的筛选”，这暗示生成训练数据时使用了执行反馈，但没有分析模型是否将反馈内化用于迭代调试或适应。论文止于报告基准得分。
